prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document relates to the Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) and its specific evaluation of the European Social Fund programme as it is implemented in England. Scotland has separate governance and program arrangements for employment and skills services, thus rendering this particular document inapplicable to Scotland.
